arts.ttl: Preview: RB Leipzig vs Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen will be looking to close the gap at the top of the table and gain revenge on their opponents as they take on RB Leipzig at the Red…

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen in negotations with a unnamed attacker over a winter move
arts.sum: kicker reports that Bayer Leverkusen are in talks with an unnamed attacker over a move to the Bundesliga in this transfer window. Leverkusen are already quite far ahead when it comes…

arts.ttl: Explained: Sesko, Arsenal and an agreement to leave Leipzig this summer
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta says Arsenal's attacking unit "need some help" after injuries to Bukayo Saka and Gabriel Jesus. So could Benjamin Sesko be the forward Arsenal make their move for?

arts.ttl: Rennes’ Mikayil Faye subject of Bayer Leverkusen approach
arts.sum: Mikayil Faye (20) has been the subject of an approach from Bundesliga side Bayer Leverkusen, just six months after signing for Stade Rennais, according to a report from Fabrizio Romano. Faye…

arts.ttl: RB Leipzig vs Bayer Leverkusen Preview: Champions in Need of Reaction
arts.sum: In a clash of titans at the top end of the Bundesliga, champions Bayer Leverkusen aim to bounce back from their Champions League defeat at the hands of Atletico Madrid, against an inconsistent RB Leipzig side.

arts.ttl: Club will do ‘everything possible’ to sign Southampton man – But Tottenham in concrete talks with agents
arts.sum: RB Leipzig will continue to do ‘everything possible’ to sign Tyler Dibling from Southampton, but face competition from Tottenham for him. That’s according to journalist Florian Plettenberg, who reports that Dibling has given the impression he would be open to a move to the Bundesliga. Plettenberg states that Leipzig would like to sign Dibling now The post Club will do ‘everything possible’ to sign Southampton man – But Tottenham in concrete talks with agents appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Leipzig to make late decision on Gulacsi for Leverkusen clash
arts.sum: Peter Gulacsi's availability for the match against Bayer Leverkusen will be decided after RB Leipzig's final training session.

arts.ttl: Leverkusen duo edging closer to return from injury
arts.sum: Both Victor Boniface and Amine Adli are edging closer to a return to action, Xabi Alonso revealed on Friday.

arts.ttl: Benjamin Sesko to Arsenal twist as West Ham and Celtic's transfer plans cause problem
arts.sum: Arsenal target Benjamin Sesko is one of the hottest strikers on the market at the moment, though his prospective move to the Emirates Stadium is under threat thanks to West Ham and Celtic

arts.ttl: West Ham set to finalize deal for RB Leipzig’s André Silva
arts.sum: West Ham United will look to finalize a deal with RB Leipzig for André Silva, according to Florian Plettenberg. The forward is now West Ham’s number one target this transfer…
